title: Gender value set Schema
description: JSON Schema for Gender value set ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions using IRI format.
narrative: This schema validates IRI-formatted codes for the Gender value set ValueSet. Each enum value includes the system URI in the format {systemuri}#{code} to match JSON-LD enumeration IRIs. Display values are available at http://example.org/ValueSet-GenderVS.displays.json. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
